name: novome
description: Adaptive learning for Codex: diagnose one missing collaboration skill, teach it briefly, and verify application during real work.

interface.shortDescription: Learn Codex while doing real work.
interface.longDescription: Novome observes how a learner frames a real Codex task, identifies one immediately relevant missing skill, delivers a concise micro-lesson, and checks whether the learner applies it.
defaultPrompt: Use Novome to coach me through this Codex task without doing the learning step for me.
Diagnose my task formulation and teach me the single most important missing skill.
